title: Integrations library for workflows
excerpt: The integrations library is incredible, and so are workflows. What I’d like to see is the ability to put them both together like you can with regular automations. For example, I want to integrate teams with a workflow, i…

posts.author: The_Frogbot (Lenard)
posts.cookedHtml: The integrations library is incredible, and so are workflows. What I’d like to see is the ability to put them both together like you can with regular automations. For example, I want to integrate teams with a workflow, it’s in the integrations library, but you can only do it with an automation, not a workflow as it stands

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Lenard! If you wouldn’t mind, I’m tasking a development team with building out integrations for ‘workflows’, and we’re using this very short form to collect feedback on specific integrations. Your input would be very valuable!
